            - Efficient Prompting Methods | papers: 411b16add23976ffcdf6422f932453f6ebcca119; 7fe071ea76e49bc3e573beb53f07721630954247; 8d17234680db76f99efd22fbcb169f45d2d79d93; 3b0c49ca5ac0f441c302c9ca4def4804253552d5; 1eb1a8c7f88de27af224153f43ecdd41774600f2; f8a2dca1e8fe56e698984c077f7ff58d8ca867e9; 4610ffb1b016acaa82a2065ffd1a3adbae1ce722; fdcb1cfe2f68e7dc3fb7d0c880a558da406b49c7; ff984211a65b29a153d261271dc1b96c036e14df; 19ac693f820fe8db1079bd576901945bfdb09832; b0435af3063195e8ae880489e64ccde64e6d7563; c35d5ac5c8e77ccb695bda70b1c8f8cb17add0e1; c6147348126a8879a14075b7993fdf6b156c44c7; 838e1317454724a9bb758d05d97e6058e11a8251; 58f14bc6de4a005b439f38fe11db6e4f95e343bf; 4ac3a110be4651c03c8f87752749cdcf6318f1a8; b3dbfcb91f8657d99942433daeccc6e17e8a40bd; f53a4f34757d1f237446b4d887d5323f2a17ed02; c874aa93efe663ed31f2ec72d45a5dd4b4cdffba; cf934ddd3c852ba9c67cdfd21bf41e7723fc6d9e; 66c5a0fbde7e06bf0ef179e660b6a211bcd80aac; aa6d5d5db5a8d82eb11e77f586e55313453742dd; 717392dac099d1506b766787382d61b277863163; 7eaaa5aec72ffb95cf538462ed205fa4d4faef9c; 0bfc804e31eecfd77f45e4ee7f4d629fffdcd628; d9fbf374536d625667341ed8a2616cd698ee628b; 629c441076da3f8185b1cf85e8036064b714e249; 3dc7dc1bea9a4f70c02b6759a0bda7aca0005a9e; 38fcc3667a907d6c94267c674aad114aae68441e; 1c475acaa1060c8318a625f24bfd88c12f367516; aad167be3c902388ea625da4117fcae4325b8b7d; 8fbd7ddf1ea30c991f3b1152a245df77caa18e16; 751855a18fceb0c613d7c0366824560d2077eb14; 2f7364d8e5cf94315bf8905f57de9c5543e9a4bf; b12541867632737e826b7b01c7fbe1c4222d8655; 7a4f8771974498f20574bfce4352cb88b2b6cd8c; 3d45fc603e34934fc589b9547307815f7723de34; 7848d4b4e6ba0897a85cebb6467e94eb0b60d583; 8ce6ad6d8a73757309d3b9f525cf15cb68e32397;
